adversarial_points: SGI may argue the vehicle value was lower due to pre-existing conditions or high mileage.
Arbitration board may focus on the technical 'total loss' threshold (~80% of value).
counter_narratives: Refer to maintenance records and recent appraisal (if available) to prove premium condition prior to collision.
Emphasize the unique unavailability of replacement vehicles (market scarcity) to argue for replacement value over scrap value.
